text:
Created attachment 143536
whois-5.1.3.patch

- Unbreak and update to 5.1.3
- Prefix installed files with the letter m (whois -> mwhois, ...)
- Minor fixes (compiler warning, correct paths in man pages)

I am interested in taking maintainership of this port, if the original maintainer is unavailable or lost interest.

Port maintainer (lapo@lapo.it) is cc'd.
